assumptions: No Fivetran account, verified email, organization, trial, source connector, destination, connection credentials, schema selection, initial sync, plan, or payment method is assumed.
A working email identity, browser, supported data source, supported owned destination, their required credentials and permissions, and network access are available.
No signup information was submitted, email was verified, external account was authorized, connection was tested, or data was synced during research.

developer_goal: Start without a Fivetran account, create and verify a free-trial identity, connect a supported data source and owned destination, pass both connection tests, start the first initial sync, and receive Fivetran's sync-complete notification.

first_success.outcome: Fivetran has connected a selected source to a selected destination and completed the connection's initial data sync.
first_success.observable_signal: Fivetran sends the developer a notification when the initial sync has finished; the connection can then be viewed in the dashboard with its status and last-synced information.

route_selection.surface: Fivetran free account trial first initial connection sync
route_selection.rule: Select the lexicographically shortest complete official route to the same first-success outcome after fixing product intent; if peer routes remain consequential, mark needs-human-judgment.

candidates.name: Fivetran free account trial first initial connection sync
candidates.reason: Recorded as a reconstructable candidate, but public evidence does not close signup-field opacity and/or peer-route lexicographic selection for a verified count.

candidates.name: Fivetran REST API getting started
candidates.reason: The REST API is an integration surface reached after account access and does not replace the platform's general new-account quickstart.

candidates.name: Connector SDK
candidates.reason: Building a custom connector is offered when a desired connector is absent and is not the recommended general account setup.

candidates.name: Snowflake trial when no destination exists
candidates.reason: This branch redirects to a separate vendor's trial and adds another account path; the primary Fivetran trial guide requires an existing supported destination.

required_path.action: Complete Fivetran account creation or trial signup at the official entry URL.

required_fields.label: Signup identity and required account fields
required_fields.notes: Public evidence does not establish the complete current required field set behind the client-rendered or authenticated signup surface.

required_path.observable_result: A new Fivetran account or trial session exists.

required_path.action: Complete any required email or identity verification for the new account.
required_path.observable_result: The account becomes usable for developer onboarding.

required_path.action: Complete the documented post-login setup for the selected Fivetran candidate through first success.

required_fields.label: Candidate-specific configuration
required_fields.notes: Exact fields depend on unresolved product, auth, or framework selection.

required_path.observable_result: Fivetran sends the developer a notification when the initial sync has finished; the connection can then be viewed in the dashboard with its status and last-synced information.

prerequisites.description: {'order': 1, 'type': 'account', 'requirement': 'Create a new Fivetran account that is eligible for its one free account trial.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S1', 'S2', 'S3']}

{'order': 2, 'type': 'verification', 'requirement': 'Use a working email address and follow the emailed verification link before entering the guided setup wizard.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S1', 'S2']}

{'order': 3, 'type': 'configuration', 'requirement': 'Have at least one supported data source; Fivetran identifies Google Sheets as the quickest setup in the own-destination guide.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S1', 'S2']}

external_gates.description: The general first-mile path requires a new Fivetran account before the guided connector setup.
Fivetran sends a confirmation email whose link must be followed before account completion.
The live initial account form is client-rendered and its exact public fields are not enumerated by the written guides.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email or identity-provider verification delivery when the selected account route requires it.

platform_outcomes.description: Complete the first initial sync during the Fivetran free account trial.

excluded.item: Incremental-sync evaluation, additional connections, transformations, Quickstart data models, activations, user invitations, seven-day usage estimates, plan selection, payment, scheduling, alerts, re-
excluded.reason: Listed as excluded after success in the source record.

uncertainties.question: What exact current required signup, identity, legal, and entitlement fields does Fivetran show for a new developer, and which peer route is the lexicographic shortest path?
uncertainties.impact: Without those fields and a closed route choice, action and field counts cannot be verified for peer comparison.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated read-only walkthrough of the live signup and the selected post-login first-success path, with screenshots of required fields and confirmation that peer routes are longer or gated.
